source: MT fitting software export / chip readback
notes: polar_pattern uses uint3→frac24 lookup table (NOT direct uint3 value)
W0-W5 verified: selection, open_ear, polar, adm_fdm, mic2_dly, mic2_cal match MT
W6-W7 verified: omni threshold frac48 matches MT within rounding
W8-W12: fixed values and filter coefficients differ from codegen (MT uses different constants)
Flash polar encoding: bi[2:0] 0=Bi, 1=Hyper, 2=Super, 3=Cardioid, 4=Omni (not 0,2,3,4,0x7F as handbook states)
